items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini Saddle Bag ~ Besace Arc de Triomphe
The real thing is truly beautiful, retro yet stylish, and goes well with any outfit! The curved bottom and flap design make it look younger. Compared to the mini version, the handle design is playful and cute. A style you'll fall in love with at first glance, exuding elegance when photographed. Can be worn crossbody, shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, and cute~
Capacity: Doesn't fit large phones well, but can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model No.: 10K502 Beige Brown (Hardware is pure steel)
Dimensions: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New in stock 🅰️🅰️ TILLY 〰️
CE 2024 Chinese New Year Limited Edition TILLY Handbag.
The latest rounded shoulder bag, continuing the tone of the CE CROQUE handbag. This minimalist style handbag is adorned with TRIOMPHE metal hardware. It can hold a phone, car keys, cosmetics, and other essentials. The capacity is sufficient. The bag shape is structured, with a zipper closure. It has 1 main compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. The shoulder strap is adjustable. Compared to the previous Tilly, this one is more retro and cute 😍!
Model No.: 115702
Color: Denim (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 22x13.5x4

items.name_cn:
Genuine Grade
CELIN.E 23 New Ava TRIOMPHE Calfskin Handbag
This time Ava adds a metal Triomphe logo buckle, making it more exquisite and beautiful 💓~ Soft calfskin and crescent moon appearance 🌙 Full texture, comes with retro fashion sense. Magnetic C-closure Triomphe flap design, interpreting French retro romance. The whole bag is lightweight yet structured 💯 Daily versatile and commuter ready ✨
Calfskin, calfskin lining, shoulder and handheld, zip closure, leather flap, full steel TRIOMPHE magnetic clasp, 1 interior flat pocket, adjustable shoulder strap, min length 22cm, max length 23cm
Size: 23 X 13.5 X 6cm
No.: 114492BZJ.04LU

Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CELINE New HELOISE HOBO Shoulder Bag, a must-have for Autumn/Winter! The rounded and smooth body shape looks a bit like the familiar AVA's enlarged version at first glance ~ Celine never disappoints 🫡 This large Hobo gives a very French lazy and casual vibe. Classic color combinations, stylish and chic, not easy to go out of style. The bag capacity can meet short business trips or daily commute, very practical!
Style No.: 114713
Color: Beige/Tawny Brown
Size: 30x7.5x28.5
